name: VPS Builder
postCreateCommand:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

mkdir -p vps_data

cat > docker-compose.yml << 'EOF'
services:
  vps:
    image: dockurr/windows
    container_name: vps
    environment:
      VERSION: "11"
      RAM: "4G"
      DISK_SIZE: "50G"
      CPU_CORES: "4"
    devices:
      - /dev/kvm
      - /dev/net/tun
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
    ports:
      - "8006:8006"
      - "3389:3389"
    volumes:
      - ./vps_data:/storage
    restart: unless-stopped

EOF

# Chờ docker daemon sẵn sàng
sleep 5

# Chạy container VPS
sudo docker compose up -d

# Tự động mở public port 8006 từ bên trong codespace
gh codespace ports visibility 8006:public -c "$CODESPACE_NAME" || true
